    • Method Detail

      • initComponents

        private void initComponents()
        This method is called from within the constructor to initialize the form. WARNING: Do NOT modify this code. The content of this method is always regenerated by the Form Editor.

      • settooltips

        private void settooltips(java.awt.Component[] component)
        Get all the label and buttons from the UI assign tool tip from the populated hashMap (helpmap) call addlinebreaks function to make tool tip in paragraph form use html tags inside tool tip to formate paragrah form.
        Parameters:
        component - UI controls

      • addLinebreaks

        public java.lang.String addLinebreaks(java.lang.String input,
                                      int maxLineLength)
        To add line breaks after every specified characters length Input: String which needed to be break in line maxLineLength: maximum length specified to break the line
        Parameters:
        input - String for help
        maxLineLength - Maximum length of a line
        Returns:
        Formatted string

      • getComponents

        private boolean getComponents(javax.swing.JPanel panel)
        This function get all the components (Textboxes) form the Jpanel from where the user pressed the specified saved button. And stores all the values to the hashmap (t_val) provided by the user.
        Parameters:
        panel - Panel to get UI controls to save data
        Returns:
        True - False

      • writeTypesinDB

        private void writeTypesinDB(java.lang.String segment)
        Parameters:
        segment - Segment Which to save data
        See Also:
        This function then formates all the provided values for hashmap (t_val) in to the specified database formate and write these formated values to the database file.

      • clearall

        private void clearall()
        After saving, clear all the textboxes for the next entry.
